scripts.download-sdk:android: shx mkdir -p eos-sdk/android && az storage blob download --overwrite -c 3rd-parties -n eos-sdk/EOS-SDK-Android-41373641-v1.17.0.zip --account-name burbankbuildwatcher --file eos-sdk/android/sdk.zip
scripts.setup:demo: npm run setup:demo:cordova && npm run setup:demo:config
scripts.setup:demo:android: cd demo && cordova platform add android
scripts.setup:demo:ios: cd demo && cordova platform add ios
scripts.refresh:common: npm run package && npm run clean:demo && npm run setup:demo
scripts.refresh:android: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:android && npm run build:demo:android
scripts.refresh:ios: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:ios && npm run build:demo:ios
scripts.restart:android: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:android && npm run run:android
scripts.restart:ios: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:ios && npm run run:ios
